name: Burgess-Rushing Tennis & Pickleball Center
description: Come play pickleball at Burgess-Rushing Tennis & Pickleball Center in Lubbock, TX! There are 16 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Courthouse / iTOP Recovery
description: Come play pickleball at Courthouse / iTOP Recovery in Lubbock, TX! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. Reservations are available.
fees: Fee required — Sign up and look for space/Time on My Sports Space APP- Call for any details on League play.

name: Davis Park
description: Come play pickleball at Davis Park in Lubbock, TX! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: LakeRidge Country Club
description: Home of The Lubbock Pickleball League and Ladder (Text "LEAGUE" to 806-751-0186 to join)

name: Lubbock Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Lubbock Country Club in Lubbock, TX! There are 9 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Lubbock Indoor Pickleball
open_play_schedule: Seven days per week 8 a.m. to 10 p.m.
fees:
Fee required — Various membership packages are available. 
No membership is required. Nonmembers pay a per person per session fee.
Nonmembers may reserve courts and ball machines.

name: McAlister Park Pickleball Facility
description: Courts divided by fencing. Picnic tables and covered pavilions by courts.

name: Preston Manner
description: Preston Manner is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wolfforth, TX. There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights. The courts are private.

name: Shallowater Mobile Home and RV Park
description: Courts are private for rv guest, permanent residents of the park and members that live in Shallowater play times are 8:00 am until dark.

name: Texas Tech Recreation Center
description: Texas Tech University Outdoor Pickleball Courts. Parking is located in the Commuter West lot or the Z5 lot on weekends. Fair warning: the water fountains next to the courts are sometimes not operational. Restrooms and other water fountains are located inside the UREC, but the building may be locked outside of regular hours.
open_play_schedule: During weekdays, courts may be reserved by the Pickleball class offered by TTU, which may result in them asking you to vacate the court. Courts can be reserved for other university events too, so check TTU UREC schedule or call ahead before heading out.
hours: Daily and Weekly Hours Upcoming Events Stay connected Follow University Recreation online to keep up with the latest. name: The Falls Athletic and Tennis Club
description: The Falls Athletic and Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lubbock, TX. There are 11 concrete courts. 4 are indoors and 7 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: The Wyatt
description: The Wyatt is a place to play pickleball in Lubbock, TX. There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water.
